title: Just Copper Golem Totem
description: Now your totem has become a copper golem, not a golden villager!
body:
## Now your totem has become a copper golem, not a golden villager!

Perfect for you if you love copper golems and steampunk! The texture continues to retain its vanilla style. Pairs perfectly with a [copper hotbar and hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/copperhud).

![totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gDvCWHpU/images/dcad0b9d55b126806c2f77090769e07f3baaf251.png)
